name: Brocade Communications Systems, Inc.
description: Brocade Communications Systems, Inc. is a technology company that specializes in data center networking solutions and services. The company provides storage area network (SAN) switches, routers, and software-defined networking (SDN) solutions designed to optimize network performance, reliability, and security. Brocade's products enable organizations to manage and scale their data storage and networking infrastructures efficiently. In November 2017, Brocade was acquired by Broadcom Inc., and its fiber channel storage area networking business continues to operate as a key division under Broadcom.
